narrative:
Ellsworth Twp township has 1,651 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points.
